response.justification: The candidate is overqualified and has a highly fragmented career with excessive focus on niche languages like DLang and embedded systems, with minimal evidence of recent, sustained work in React, Nest.js, or PostgreSQL — the core technologies required for this role. Their resume suggests senior-level autonomy and leadership, conflicting with the junior/mid-level individual contributor scope, and their work history shows little alignment with renewable energy or construction tech domains.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and public technical outreach
Proven ability to learn and deploy diverse technologies rapidly
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role with mismatched seniority expectations
Lack of demonstrable recent experience with required stack (React, Nest.js, PostgreSQL)
Minimal alignment with renewable energy/construction tech industry context
